title: Korean-Style Sweet Potato Wrap
description: A delicious and healthy wrap filled with roasted sweet potatoes, crispy vegetables, and a hint of Korean spice.

ingredients.name: Sweet Soy Sauce
ingredients.notes: Make or buy a sweet soy sauce

instructions: Poke some holes in the sweet potatoes and roast for 45-60 minutes, or until tender.
Meanwhile, toast the wraps according to package instructions.
In a small bowl, whisk together the sweet soy sauce and Korean chili flakes.
Assemble the wraps by spreading a spoonful of the soy sauce mixture on the bottom of each wrap.
Add a roasted sweet potato half, some shredded lettuce, sliced cucumber, and any additional toppings you like.
Fold the bottom half of the wrap up over the filling, then fold in the sides and roll the wrap up tightly.
Optional: Add some crispy kimchi or pickled carrots for extra flavor and texture.
